ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "highlight" TEXT /* Highlight feature of the product */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon associated with the product */,
  "schema_version" TEXT /* Version of the schema used for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number or SKU of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability status of the product */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, inactive, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each info entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product this info belongs to */,
  "info_text" TEXT /* Additional information about the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the info was created */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Type of additional information (e.g., specifications, usage instructions, promotional details) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the additional information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_info_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image associated with the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated category */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the category for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change occurred */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schema_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schema version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the schema */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the schema version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current one being used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
